descriptions: male, latin, acoustic guitar, shaker, relaxed, summer vibe, the bpm is 105.
gt_lyric: [intro-short] ; [verse] El sol calienta la arena blanca. La vida pasa con calma y danza. Siente el ritmo de la marea. Bajo la palma la luna rodea. ; [chorus] Baila conmigo corazon. Bajo el fuego de la pasion. ; [inst-medium] ; [outro-medium]

descriptions: male, rock, energetic, distorted electric guitar, powerful drums, the bpm is 140.
gt_lyric: [intro-long] ; [verse] Heavy clouds are rolling in. Let the chaos now begin. Thunder screams across the sky. Watch the fire in my eye. ; [chorus] Break the chains and feel the roar. We don't take it anymore. ; [inst-short] ; [outro-short]

descriptions: male, pop, smooth, melodic, traditional elements, the bpm is 88.
gt_lyric: [intro-medium] ; [verse] 明月装饰了你的窗子. 你装饰了别人的梦. ; [chorus] 在这个寂静的夜晚. 我们找回了失落的歌. ; [bridge] 梦境依然. ; [outro-medium]

descriptions: female, jazz, nostalgic, saxophone, brush drums, the bpm is 72.
gt_lyric: [intro-short] ; [verse] Dans le silence de la rue. Une melodie s'est perdue. Le parfum du cafe noir. Nous guide a travers le miroir. ; [chorus] C'est la vie en nuances de gris. Sous le ciel de Paris. ; [inst-long] ; [outro-short]

descriptions: female, electronic, energetic, pulsating synth bass, the bpm is 128.
gt_lyric: [intro-medium] ; [verse] Neonlichter blitzen hell. Die Zeit vergeht viel zu schnell. Kalter Stahl und heisser Tanz. Im fahlen Licht der Eleganz. ; [chorus] Wir verlieren uns im Klang. Die Nacht ist noch so unendlich lang. ; [bridge] System Neustart ein neuer Schlag. ; [outro-short]
